title: Recovery Spectacle
intendedTensionBeat: The hero rescue is visually urgent but cleaner than the prior exam.
intendedReleaseBeat: A satisfying dock-safe route move extracts the hero puppy and rebuilds confidence.
expectedPath: Make a satisfying triple-clear route move that visibly stabilizes the dock, rescue hero puppy, then finish secondary.
expectedFailMode: Wrong play is mostly inefficient; repeated broad clears can still create dock trouble.
designNotes: Add a golden path proving the intended extraction beat.
